full_text:
Song Bai 宋白
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Song Bai (宋白). Magistrate, takes in the defeated Guanqiu Jian, then murders the drunken guest. Song Bai is a fictional character. Song Bai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
